---
title: "ANTM 1Q26 Results: Strong Beat on Gold Turnaround and Nickel Ore ASP Boost"
date: "2026-04-29"
category: "micro"
impact: "positive"
region: "Indonesia"
tickers: ["ANTM"]
source: "Indo Premier Sekuritas"
url: "https://news.google.?oc=5"
---

## Summary
Aneka Tambang (ANTM) delivered a strong Q1 2026 earnings beat driven by gold segment turnaround and higher nickel ore average selling prices (ASP), according to Indo Premier Sekuritas analysis.

## Key Points

• **Gold turnaround** — ANTM's gold operations reversed previous weakness, contributing significantly to the quarterly outperformance

• **Nickel ore ASP boost** — Higher average selling prices for nickel ore improved segment margins despite volatile LME nickel prices

• **Earnings beat** — Q1 2026 results exceeded consensus estimates, validating the diversified mining model (gold + nickel)

• **Broker positive** — Indo Premier Sekuritas maintains favorable view on ANTM's operational execution

## Portfolio Impact

🟢 **Positive for ANTM** — Strong Q1 validates operational resilience. Gold turnaround reduces reliance on nickel volatility.

🟡 **Sector read-through for ESSA/INCO** — ANTM's nickel ore ASP strength suggests resilient demand, but ESSA (ammonia/chemical) and INCO (pure nickel) have different exposure profiles. Monitor if nickel price strength translates downstream.

⚠️ **Caution** — ANTM's gold exposure drove much of the beat. Pure nickel plays (INCO, ESSA) may not see equivalent benefits. ESSA's ammonia business faces different demand dynamics than ANTM's ore mining.

---
